texto: Tough times should serve only one purpose in your life
autor: to teach you how to be tougher on the inside than your circumstances are on the outside.
explicacao: Orientação direta de to teach you how to be tougher on the inside than your circumstances are on the outside. sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “Tough times should serve only one purpose in your life” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, dewayne-owens, tough, útil em momentos de reflexao.
